Accelerating indigenous helicopter programs is crucial to ensure frontline warships have integral airborne ASW capabilities, closing a critical gap as underwater threats escalate across the Indo-Pacific.

He also recounted his mother's initial, culturally unaware question about Usha's 'tribe,' highlighting his family's unfamiliarity with diverse cultures, though they eventually embraced Usha wholeheartedly.

One of world’s richest persons & Louis Vuitton CEO on Elon Musk becoming trillionaire
description: Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire following SpaceX's historic public listing, with the company's valuation exceeding $2 trillion. Bernard Arnault, CEO of LVMH, acknowledged Musk's dominance in the rocket industry but clarified that the wealth represents company value, not liquid assets. Musk emphasized SpaceX's ambition to make humanity multi-planetary and space travel accessible to all.

Jeff Bezos’ ex-wife donates most of wealth to HBCUs after selling Amazon stake
description: MacKenzie Scott, a prominent philanthropist, has donated over $26 billion to 2,700 organizations, including significant contributions to Historically Black Colleges and Universities. Her trust-based approach involves unrestricted donations, empowering recipients to use funds freely. Despite her immense generosity, Scott's net worth remains substantial, and she remains committed to giving away her fortune.

E20 petrol attracts ants? BPCL responds to viral claim, explains matter
description: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has officially clarified that E20 petrol does not attract ants, dismissing viral social media claims. The company stated there is no scientific evidence to support the notion, explaining that the ethanol used in fuel is processed to remove sugars and contains insect-repellent denaturants.

US-Iran war impact: India’s Russian oil imports may touch all-time high in June
description: With a US sanctions waiver in place for three months, India stepped up Russian crude oil procurement, and import levels touched near all-time highs. According to analysis of data by Sumit Ritolia, Manager Modelling and Refining at Kpler, India’s crude imports from Russia could hit an all time high of 2.35 million barrels per day in June.

India's world-class airports and the first-impression challenge facing its cities
description: Many Indian cities struggle to impress travellers from the air, often revealing informal settlements and pollution, unlike the orderly, greener landscapes of Singapore, Bangkok, or Colombo. This stark contrast stems from rapid urbanisation, immense population density, and governance challenges, despite India's economic growth. While infrastructure is improving, the sheer scale of the problem presents a significant hurdle.

As Accenture shares fall 20%, Julie Sweet says investors are missing the point
description: Accenture's stock plummeted nearly 20% following fiscal third-quarter results that missed revenue expectations and showed a decline in new bookings. Despite the drop, CEO Julie Sweet urged investors to remain patient, highlighting the company's strong positioning for long-term growth driven by AI adoption and a revised salary structure to offer immediate cash to employees.

title: In days before he killed house help, friends saw marked change in doctor
description: South Delhi residents are baffled by the arrest of dermatologist Manish Gupta for allegedly murdering his domestic help. While neighbours saw him as reserved, friends noted behavioral changes and recalled he may have been treated for depression. Gupta was known for his charitable work and professional achievements, making the accusation of violence against a long-time employee difficult to comprehend.

title: Man thrashes wife, tonsures her head; arrested after video surfaces
description: A shocking incident unfolded in Korea district, Chhattisgarh, where a man was arrested for brutally assaulting his wife. He allegedly tonsured her head and forced her to drink urine. The FIR was registered after disturbing videos surfaced online. The woman, who had a love marriage 15 years ago, accused her husband of character assassination and abandonment prior to the attack.
